$comment: Declarative NATS JetStream stream definitions (instructions.md §8.2). Provisioned idempotently by tools/provision_nats.py. One stream per logical domain; subjects use '>' for multi-token wildcards (e.g. per-conversation event subjects).

streams.name: INBOUND
streams.description: Inbound normalized messages from all channel adapters + the automation-service (§7.4).

streams.name: AGENT_EVENTS
streams.description: Per-conversation AgentEvent stream. Replay source for gap-free WebSocket resume via last_seq (§8.3).

streams.name: ORCHESTRATOR
streams.description: Commands to the orchestrator (create/dispatch/cancel sandbox turns, §10.3).
